raw_consumer_statement:
I am requesting that my case be opened. I had previously fought the charge mentioned above with no satisfactory result. 

After much investigation, I have found that other people have experienced the same situation while traveling abroad. Attached you will find the forums. 

To reiterate my situation, on XX/XX/2024 I handed my Barclays card at a gas station in XXXX, XXXX. The gas attendant handed it back to me claiming the card was denied. I then proceeded to pay with cash and no proof of payment was given. After my trip, I came to find that my card was charged {$590.00} from a merchant I did not work with.
